name: American Resources Corp
summary: American Resources Corporation (AREC) acquires and operates coal mining and processing assets in eastern Kentucky and western West Virginia, focused on metallurgical coal for steelmaking. Subsidiaries include American Infrastructure Corporation (coal mining), ReElement Technologies (critical and rare earth element purification and monetization), and Electrified Materials Corporation (recovered metal and steel aggregation). All mining operations are currently idled due to adverse market conditions.

products.name: Metallurgical Coal (High-vol B)
products.description: Coal mined and processed for steelmaking industry, sold domestically and internationally.

products.name: Pulverized Coal Injection
products.description: Coal product used in the steel making process.

products.name: High-BTU Low Sulfur Bituminous Coal
products.description: Coal product for industrial customers and specialty uses.

products.name: Critical and Rare Earth Element Purification
products.description: ReElement Technologies purifies and monetizes critical/rare earth elements and end-of-life magnets and batteries.

products.name: Recovered Metal and Steel
products.description: Electrified Materials Corporation aggregates, recovers, and sells recovered metal and steel.

products.name: Coal Processing Services
products.description: McCoy Elkhorn processes, stores, and loads coal for regional producers at Bevins #1 and #2 preparation plants.

partnerships.description: Rail transportation provider servicing McCoy Elkhorn and Knott County Coal preparation plant rail loadouts.
